title: 3Pc Serving Ceramic Bowls Christmas Tree Set with Bamboo Tray Festive Snack Serving Dish Xmas Party Appetiser Bowl
features: No Christmas party is complete without snacks, so add a touch of festive fun to the table with this Christmas tree serving set.
The tray has a hole in the handle to hang up for easier storage. Hand wash only. Not suitable for microwave or dishwasher.
Each set comes with a Christmas tree shaped bamboo tray and three Green ceramic dishes that fit within the tray. Ideal for snacks and dips.
Tray Length 32cm x Width 20cm x Depth 1cm
Small dish Length 6.8cm x Width 9.3cm x Depth 3cm
Medium Dish Length 6.8cm x Width 13.8cm x Depth 3cm
Large dish Length 7.5cm x Width 17cm x Depth 3cm
Dimensions: Length 32cm x Width 20cm x Depth 4cm
description: 3-Piece Christmas Tree Serving Bowl Set. Featuring three ceramic appetizer bowls shaped like layers of a Christmas tree plus a matching bamboo tray, this set is designed for stylish and practical serving. Perfect for snacks, nibbles, sweets, dips, nuts and finger foods, this set makes holiday entertaining simple and decorative. The ceramic bowls have a premium glazed finish, while the bamboo tray adds a warm rustic touch.
